elements.text: Recently, your partner mentioned that they find a certain celebrity attractive. This celebrity looks nothing like you, and you wonder if your partner has changed their preferences since the beginning of your relationship. You think that they still find you...

elements.name: comparing_yourself_to_others--romantic_relationships--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.

elements.text: The more you immerse yourself in the story, the more likely you are to benefit from our program – really picture yourself in the situation at hand.
